pi_items.source: Task description explicitly dictates configuring the exact string `|;`

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for bcwebcam_env configure_scan_suffix task by discovering that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) are missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely because it attempts to read the non-existent task_result.json output file. The target suffix string requirements match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt description.
